hook: Maturity in dating often means knowing when uncertain interest is not enough to build on.
body: You can be patient without becoming self-abandoning, and hopeful without becoming blind.

hook: Some men confuse tolerance for ambiguity with emotional strength even as the dynamic keeps draining them.
body: Self-respect includes deciding how much uncertainty you are willing to normalize.

hook: Self-respect includes deciding how much uncertainty you are willing to normalize.
body: A little initial ambiguity is normal. Ongoing emotional fog is usually trying to teach you something.

body: Define your threshold for ambiguity before the next unclear situation asks you to improvise one.
